meta.project: Convex + Next.js + Clerk Dealership Management App

product_overview: A dealership operations web app for managing organizations, inventory, customers, leads, sales, expenses, approvals, reporting, and team settings. It supports authenticated, org-based workflows with English/Arabic language switching and configurable business settings.
core_goals: Create and access a dealership organization
Manage vehicle inventory and customer records
Track leads through a configurable sales pipeline
Record cash and installment sales through a guided wizard
Review and act on profit approval requests
Track expenses, commissions, tasks, and financial reports
Configure organization settings, pipeline stages, custom fields, and team access

features.name: Org Routing & Entry Redirect
features.description: Users are routed into the correct organization context after sign-in, and the app keeps the active organization in the URL while preventing access to organizations they do not belong to.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Sign in -> Land on the first organization dashboard -> Continue using the app within that organization context
Navigate to a different org URL you do not belong to -> Get redirected back to /dashboard -> Land on a valid post-login entry point
Use the organization switcher in the top navigation -> Switch to another organization -> See the URL update while staying on the same sub-page

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: New users without an organization can create their first dealership organization and set core defaults before entering the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See the onboarding wizard -> Enter dealership name -> Continue to the currency step -> Select a currency -> Continue through setup -> Skip or load defaults for lead sources and pipeline -> Go to the dashboard -> Land on the new organization dashboard

features.name: Vehicle Inventory Management
features.description: Users can search, add, edit, and delete vehicles in inventory, including VIN-based auto-fill for vehicle details.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/vehicles -> Search for a vehicle -> See filtered inventory results

Navigate to /{orgId}/vehicles -> Add a vehicle -> Enter a VIN -> Trigger VIN decode -> See make, model, and year auto-filled -> Fill in the remaining vehicle details -> Save -> See the vehicle appear in the inventory list
Navigate to /{orgId}/vehicles -> Select a vehicle to edit -> Update vehicle details -> Save -> See the updated values in the inventory list
Navigate to /{orgId}/vehicles -> Delete a vehicle -> Confirm the deletion -> See the vehicle removed from the inventory list

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Users can create, search, update, and remove customer records from the CRM list.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/customers -> Search by name or phone -> See matching customer records
Navigate to /{orgId}/customers -> Add a customer -> Enter first name, last name, phone, and email -> Save -> See the new customer in the list
Navigate to /{orgId}/customers -> Select a customer to edit -> Update the details -> Save -> See the updated customer record in the list
Navigate to /{orgId}/customers -> Delete a customer -> Confirm the deletion -> See the customer removed from the list

features.name: Lead Pipeline
features.description: Users can manage sales leads in a Kanban-style pipeline and move leads between stages.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/leads -> View leads grouped by stage in Kanban columns
Navigate to /{orgId}/leads -> Add a lead -> Select a customer -> Select a vehicle of interest -> Choose a lead source and pipeline stage -> Save -> See the lead appear on the board
Navigate to /{orgId}/leads -> Open a lead card -> Edit the lead details -> Save -> See the updated lead information
Navigate to /{orgId}/leads -> Change the stage for a lead -> See the lead move to a different pipeline column

features.name: Cash & Installment Sale Wizard
features.description: Users can record a cash sale or installment sale through a guided multi-step wizard, with draft resumption from the sales home page.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/sales -> Start a cash sale or installment sale -> Select a vehicle from the searchable list -> Select or create a customer -> Enter the sale price -> Review the summary -> Confirm -> See the sale appear in the recent sales list

Navigate to /{orgId}/sales -> Start an installment sale -> Complete the wizard steps -> Save a draft automatically -> Return later -> Resume the draft from the sales home page -> Continue from where they left off -> Confirm the sale -> See it appear in the recent sales list

features.name: Cancel In-Progress Draft and Pending Deals
features.description: Sales users can discard an unfinished wizard draft or cancel their own pending profit-approval deal from the sales home page.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/sales -> See a saved in-progress draft -> Discard the draft -> See it removed from the resume section
Navigate to /{orgId}/sales -> See a pending profit-approval deal -> Cancel the request -> See the deal removed from the pending deals list

features.name: Expense Tracking
features.description: Users can record, search, and delete operational expenses with category and optional vehicle linkage.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/expenses -> Record an expense -> Enter title, amount, category, vendor name, and date -> Save -> See the expense in the list
Navigate to /{orgId}/expenses -> Record an expense -> Link it to a vehicle if needed -> Save -> See the linked expense in the list
Navigate to /{orgId}/expenses -> Search expenses by title or category -> See filtered expense results
Navigate to /{orgId}/expenses -> Delete an expense -> Confirm the deletion -> See the expense removed from the list

features.name: Approval Workflow
features.description: Managers can review profit approval requests and approve or reject deals that fall below the minimum profit threshold.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/approvals -> View pending approval cards -> Review salesperson, vehicle, requested profit, and minimum allowed profit
Navigate to /{orgId}/approvals -> Approve a deal -> See the approved request disappear from the list
Navigate to /{orgId}/approvals -> Reject a deal -> See the rejected request disappear from the list

features.name: Language Toggle (EN/AR RTL)
features.description: Users can switch the application language between English and Arabic, including right-to-left layout behavior in Arabic.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/dashboard -> Use the language toggle in the top navigation -> See the interface switch to Arabic with RTL layout
Navigate to /{orgId}/dashboard -> Use the language toggle again -> See the interface switch back to English with LTR layout

features.name: General Settings
features.description: Users can configure organization-level currency, VAT, and branding details for the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/general -> Change the currency -> Enter a VAT rate -> Save -> See organization settings persist
Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/general -> Update branding details such as logo or WhatsApp information -> Save -> See the updated settings reflected in the organization configuration

features.name: Pipeline Stage Configuration
features.description: Users can customize the lead pipeline by seeding defaults, editing stage details, changing order, and toggling stages on or off.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/pipeline -> Seed the default pipeline stages -> See stages populate in the configuration list
Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/pipeline -> Edit a stage label -> Change the stage color -> Save -> See the updated stage settings
Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/pipeline -> Reorder stages -> Toggle a stage inactive -> See the pipeline configuration update

features.name: Custom Fields
features.description: Users can create custom fields for vehicles, customers, and leads, and those fields become available in the corresponding create/edit dialogs.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/custom-fields -> Select an entity type tab -> Add a field -> Enter the field name, key, and type -> Save -> See the new field in the configuration list
Navigate to /{orgId}/settings/custom-fields -> Add a custom field for vehicles, customers, or leads -> Open the corresponding create or edit dialog -> See the custom field available in the form

features.name: Reports
features.description: Users can view financial and inventory reports with date-range filtering and performance breakdowns.
user_flows: Navigate to /{orgId}/reports -> Select a date range -> See total revenue, profit, and expenses charts -> Review the salesperson performance breakdown
Navigate to /{orgId}/reports -> Change the date range -> See the report metrics update for the selected period

features.name: Notifications
features.description: A multi-channel notification system (in-app, email, WhatsApp) covering meaningful actions across the app (leads, sales, vehicles, approvals, finance, team changes, admin actions), with per-user category/channel preferences, a dedicated notifications page, and super-admin broadcast announcements. Notification text is bilingual (English/Arabic).
user_flows: Trigger an action that notifies managers (e.g. add a vehicle) -> Open the bell dropdown -> See the new notification with a live unread badge and chime -> Click it to navigate and mark it read
Open /[orgId]/notifications -> Browse the paginated Inbox, filter by category, mark items read or archive them -> Switch to the Archive tab to see archived items
Open the Preferences tab on /[orgId]/notifications -> Toggle Email/WhatsApp for a category -> Enter a WhatsApp number -> Reload and confirm the preferences persisted

As a super admin, open /admin/notifications -> Compose a broadcast for one organization or all organizations -> Send it -> See it appear in the recipient bell/notifications page and in the broadcast history table

routes.description: Public landing page
Clerk sign-in page
Clerk sign-up page

Post-login entry point. Has no org segment yet — it loads the signed-in user's organizations, redirects to /{orgId}/dashboard if they belong to one (their first org), or renders the onboarding wizard in-place if they belong to none.

Main KPI dashboard showing revenue, vehicles, leads. orgId is a Convex organization id taken from the URL; the page redirects back to /dashboard if the signed-in user is not a member of that org. Users with the SALES role are auto-redirected to /{orgId}/sales.
Vehicle inventory list with search, filter, add/edit/delete
Customer CRM list with search and dialog-based CRUD
Lead pipeline board with Kanban view and stage management
Sales home with cash/installment wizard launchers, in-progress draft resume (with Discard), and pending profit-approval deals (with Cancel)
Completed sales list with search, edit, delete, PDF export, and a link to the linked finance application
Finance applications list linked to installment sales
Expense tracking list with CRUD
Profit approval requests for managers to approve/reject
Commission calculations per salesperson
General ledger, fixed assets, partner equity, and claims tabs
Financial and inventory reports with date filtering
Task management with assignment and history
Team member management with role assignment
Org settings (currency, VAT, timezone, logo, WhatsApp)
Finance company configuration for installment sales
Lead pipeline stage configuration
Manage lead source labels
Create custom fields for vehicles, customers, leads
Tiered commission configuration by profit threshold
Manage dealership branches
Manage third-party vehicle valuation companies
Inbox for in-app user feedback submissions

features.name: Org Routing & Entry Redirect
features.description: Active organization is carried entirely in the URL (the [orgId] segment), not in client storage. The /dashboard entry point picks the user's org (or shows onboarding), and OrgProvider redirects back to /dashboard if a URL references an org the signed-in user does not belong to.
user_interactions: Sign in and land on /{orgId}/dashboard automatically
Switch organizations via the OrgSwitcher in the top nav; URL's orgId segment updates while staying on the same sub-page
Manually navigate to a URL with an org id the user does not belong to and get redirected back to /dashboard instead of seeing an error

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: Multi-step wizard for first-time users (zero org memberships) to create their org and pick currency
user_interactions: New user with no org sees the wizard rendered in place of a redirect
Enter dealership name in text input
Click Continue to proceed to currency step
Select currency from dropdown
Click Continue, then Skip or load defaults for lead sources and pipeline
Click "Go to Dashboard" button
Redirected to /{newOrgId}/dashboard

features.name: Vehicle Inventory Management
features.description: Add, edit, delete vehicles with VIN decode, image upload, approval workflow
user_interactions: Click "Add Vehicle" button to open dialog
Type a VIN and click the decode icon
Verify make, model, year auto-filled by NHTSA API
Fill color, mileage, purchase price, selling price
Click Save
See new vehicle in inventory table
Click pencil icon to edit a vehicle
Click trash icon and confirm deletion
Search vehicles using search input

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Create and manage customer records
user_interactions: Search customers by name or phone
Click "Add Customer" to open dialog
Fill firstName, lastName, phone, email
Click Save to create
Click edit icon to update a customer
Click delete icon and confirm to remove

features.name: Lead Pipeline
features.description: Kanban board for tracking sales leads through configurable pipeline stages
user_interactions: View leads grouped by stage in Kanban columns
Click "Add Lead" button
Select customer from searchable dropdown
Select vehicle of interest from searchable dropdown
Select lead source and pipeline stage
Click Save
Click a lead card to edit it
Change stage dropdown to move lead through pipeline

features.name: Cash & Installment Sale Wizard
features.description: Three-step guided wizard to record a cash or installment vehicle sale, with draft auto-save and resume
user_interactions: Click "Cash Sale" or "Installment" button on sales home page

user_interactions.Step 2: Select or create customer, enter sale price

user_interactions: See sale appear in recent sales list

features.name: Cancel In-Progress Draft and Pending Deals
features.description: A salesperson can discard their auto-saved wizard draft, or cancel their own pending profit-approval request, directly from the sales home page
user_interactions: With an in-progress draft saved, click "Discard" next to "Resume Draft" to remove it
With a PENDING profit-approval deal listed under "Pending Deals", click "Cancel" to withdraw the request
Cancelled/discarded items disappear from their respective lists

features.name: Expense Tracking
features.description: Record and categorize operational expenses
user_interactions: Click "Record Expense" button
Fill title, amount, category (REPAIR/MAINTENANCE/DETAILING)
Enter vendor name and date
Optionally link to a vehicle
Click Save
Search expenses by title or category
Click delete and confirm to remove

features.name: Approval Workflow
features.description: Managers review and approve/reject below-minimum-profit sale requests
user_interactions: View pending approval cards showing salesperson and vehicle
See requested profit vs minimum allowed
Click Approve button to approve the deal
Click Reject button to reject the deal
Approved card disappears from the list

features.name: Language Toggle (EN/AR RTL)
features.description: Switch UI between English (LTR) and Arabic (RTL)
user_interactions: Click the language toggle button in the top nav (shows EN or AR)
UI text switches to Arabic
Layout direction flips to RTL
Click again to return to English LTR

features.name: General Settings
features.description: Configure org currency, VAT rate, and branding
user_interactions: Navigate to Settings > General
Change currency dropdown to AED
Enter VAT rate
Click Save
Verify currency symbol updates across app

features.name: Pipeline Stage Configuration
features.description: Customize lead pipeline stage labels, colors, and order
user_interactions: Navigate to Settings > Pipeline
Click "Seed Defaults" to load default stages
Edit a stage label
Change stage color
Drag stages to reorder
Toggle a stage inactive

features.name: Custom Fields
features.description: Create custom fields for vehicles, customers, and leads
user_interactions: Navigate to Settings > Custom Fields
Select entity type tab (Vehicle / Customer / Lead)
Click "Add Field"
Enter field name, key, type
Save field
Custom field appears in the entity's create/edit dialog

features.name: Reports
features.description: Financial and inventory analytics with date range filtering
user_interactions: Navigate to Reports
Select a date range from the date picker
View total revenue, profit, and expenses charts
See salesperson performance breakdown

known_limitations.issue: Auth flows use Clerk hosted pages — E2E tests need pre-seeded test credentials
known_limitations.impact: Login step requires real Clerk test user credentials in env vars

known_limitations.issue: VIN decode calls external NHTSA API — may be slow or unavailable in CI
known_limitations.impact: VIN decode assertions may need a mock or longer timeout

known_limitations.issue: All authenticated routes now require a valid orgId URL segment (/{orgId}/...); there is no static /vehicles, /customers, etc. path anymore
known_limitations.impact: Tests must navigate via UI links/redirects (or capture the orgId from the post-login redirect) rather than hardcoding a bare path like /vehicles
